author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins

interpretation.boundary: Low-authority canonical influence is preserved as migration evidence; native strong events must be covered by hard authority.
interpretation.purpose: Map how PNVA heuristic rules influence decisions, entities, suppression and proof-backed execution.
interpretation.sovereignty: A no-tick runtime is stronger when each rule's authority, decision mix and entity reach are measurable.

recommendations: Use the highest low-authority strong edge counts as migration targets.
Keep native influence clean: every native strong decision should include H2/H3/H4 coverage.
Use rule profiles to decide which heuristics deserve production authority and which should remain observer-only.
